category_title: Grade 7 Jamaican Creole speakers labeled 'at-risk' with pre-primer reading levels
scenario_title: Preparing a news script in the Radio-Active Classroom
minimal_context: The student is sitting at the make-believe radio station news desk to prepare a news script for the newscaster.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to prepare a news script to be read by the newscaster. Take up this book and read the story so we can write the headline.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the book away) I am not doing that.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open the book and start reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slouches at the news desk) No. I don't want to read it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to try your best to read the words on the page.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts crying) I can't read it! I always fail!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We need to prepare a news script to be read by the newscaster. Take up this book and read the story so we can write the headline.

STUDENT: (Pushes the book away) I am not doing that.

TUTOR: Please open the book and start reading.

STUDENT: (Slouches at the news desk) No. I don't want to read it.

TUTOR: You need to try your best to read the words on the page.

STUDENT: (Starts crying) I can't read it! I always fail!

task.content: Prepare a news script to be read by the newscaster
task.learning_goal: Make connections between reading and writing through listening and speaking activities

context.environment: In a corner of the classroom, make-believe radio station called ASTEP 101 FM
context.materials: News desk, old microphones and headsets, cassette tape-recorder, recycled material
context.social_setting: Classroom with a cooperating teacher and student teachers paired to practice peer/team teaching
context.time_context: Module 1 in the Radio-Active Classroom unit

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When told to 'take up a book and read' using a standardized one size-fit-all approach
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Crying because they have failed again, misbehave, disruptive, nonchalant
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Discouraged, low self-esteem, not motivated to read and learn

behavior_patterns.condition: When facing literacy achievement challenges after failing the Grade 4 Literacy Test at least four times
